requirement: Plastic packaging placed on the EU market must meet mandatory minimum recycled-content targets. For contact-sensitive plastic packaging (e.g. consumer electronics retail packaging) the initial target is 10 % recycled content by 2030, rising to 50 % by 2040. Producers must declare recycled content on the packaging or a technical file available on request.
gap: 'FlexGlow RGB Strip 5m' is sold in a market covered by PPWR-2025-ART7-RECYCLED-CONTENT but the required compliance has not been demonstrated.

requirement: Any manufacturer or authorised representative that places electrical or electronic equipment (EEE) on the German market must register with the stiftung ear (Gemeinsames Rücknahmesystem) before the first placing on the market. Registration must state the equipment category (ElektroG Annex I), brand, and annual quantity placed. Unregistered EEE may not be sold in Germany.
gap: 'NordBeam LED Panel 600' is sold in a market covered by ELEKTROG-2021-S6-WEEE-DE but the required compliance has not been demonstrated.

alert.message: BrewEasy Appliances S.r.l.: your QuickBoil Kettle 1.7L must comply with Reg (EU) ElektroG-DE-2021 — § 6 ElektroG (Elektro- und Elektronikgerätegesetz) by 2024-01-01. Source: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/dir/2012/19/oj

requirement: Any manufacturer or authorised representative that places electrical or electronic equipment (EEE) on the German market must register with the stiftung ear (Gemeinsames Rücknahmesystem) before the first placing on the market. Registration must state the equipment category (ElektroG Annex I), brand, and annual quantity placed. Unregistered EEE may not be sold in Germany.
